80 / 20
AI runs the repeatable 80%, the human owns the 20%
3D + Deepen
the method, enforced by the product
Live
at maxxim.ai
The challenge

Prove that a proven, human-led method could run at AI speed without losing the human at the wheel.

The method

Run through 3D.

01

Discover

The trust gap, named: agencies have the human without the speed, AI tools have the speed without the human.

02

Design

A calm, high-contrast identity that earns trust through legibility and restraint — Signal Blue, Poppins, the gated-M mark.

03

Deploy

The platform, the portal, and the showcase — every output carrying a named person's accountability at the gate.

Services
  • Brand
  • Platform
  • Operating system
Sectors
  • AI
  • Marketing platform
  • Operating system

Maxxim is the commercialisation engine that runs the method at AI speed, with an accountable human at every gate. It is also its own best case study.

Ask about the method, accountability, ownership, or the work. I answer only from Maxxim's approved material — anything else, I'll point you to a human.
